issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1244: remaining Python asset sweep 4/10

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1244 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The shared .symphony/workpad.md is concurrently updated by later heartbeat lanes, so the durable BIG-GO-1244 evidence is recorded in the lane report artifacts.
The lane focuses on preserving the Go-only replacement surface because there were no physical Python files left to delete in-branch.
The lane landed on origin/main after fetch-plus-rebase reconciliation against concurrent heartbeat pushes.
